title_pt: Domínios da Nutrição do Estilo de Vida em guias alimentares e diretrizes clínicas: revisão de escopo e análise documental para subsidiar o Protocolo NutEV
title_en: Lifestyle Nutrition Domains in Food-Based Dietary Guidelines and Clinical Nutrition Guidance: A Scoping Review and Documentary Analysis to Inform the NutEV Protocol
research_question: Quais recomendações e domínios alimentares, nutricionais, comportamentais, contextuais e de implementação estão presentes em guias alimentares oficiais e diretrizes clínicas relevantes, e como esses elementos podem subsidiar a arquitetura do Protocolo NutEV?

eligible_sources: official implementation documents directly linked to an eligible food guide

include: latest official version in force at the search date
documents with identifiable issuing organization and public provenance
documents containing dietary, food, behavioral, contextual or implementation recommendations
exclude: randomized or non-randomized intervention studies as primary corpus
duplicate or superseded versions when a current version is available

time_rule.official_documents: include the current eligible version regardless of publication year
time_rule.bibliographic_support: use date limits only when explicitly justified in the protocol

analytic_domains.B: food literacy, culinary competence and culinary medicine

success_criteria: no candidate recommendation automatically promoted to final recommendation

methodological_guardrails: The software supports but does not replace human eligibility decisions.
Population guidance and clinical guidance must be analyzed as separate evidence lenses before cross-lens synthesis.
Intervention effectiveness studies are outside the primary corpus of Article 1.
RecommendationCandidate is not a final NutEV recommendation.
Raw outputs must not be overwritten by curated outputs.
